narration: Science has a clearer story about coronal mass ejections than social media does.

narration: Coronal mass ejections, or CMEs, are massive bursts of solar wind and magnetic fields rising above the solar corona.
visual_description: Context visual: Coronal mass ejections, or CMEs, are massive bursts of solar wind and magnetic fields rising above the solar corona.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Coronal mass ejections, or CMEs, are massive bursts of solar wind and magnetic fields rising above the solar corona.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Coronal mass ejections, or CMEs, are massive bursts of solar wind and magnetic fields rising above the solar corona.

narration: They can unleash trillions of tons of plasma, affecting satellites, power grids, and even our atmosphere.
visual_description: Escalation visual: They can unleash trillions of tons of plasma, affecting satellites, power grids, and even our atmosphere.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: They can unleash trillions of tons of plasma, affecting satellites, power grids, and even our atmosphere.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: They can unleash trillions of tons of plasma, affecting satellites, power grids, and even our atmosphere.

narration: NASA tracks these events closely, but predicting their exact impact is still a challenge.
visual_description: Evidence visual: NASA tracks these events closely, but predicting their exact impact is still a challenge.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: NASA tracks these events closely, but predicting their exact impact is still a challenge.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: NASA tracks these events closely, but predicting their exact impact is still a challenge.

narration: So, the next time you hear about a CME, remember: it’s not just science fiction; it’s a cosmic reality impacting our tech and lives.
